description: IPv6 range delete is Destroy: confirm alone is blocked by the bypass gate, and a bypass DELETEs the slash path-escaped range. Missing-range rejection diverges (Go 'range must be a non-empty string' vs Python 'range is required') so it is left out; see report.

cases.name: rejects a malformed range
cases.expect_error: range must be a valid IPv6 prefix

cases.name: confirm alone is blocked by the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_ipv6_range_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)

cases.name: deletes the IPv6 range when authorized
